description: Configure SEO settings for your website including meta tags, Open Graph, and social media integration.

fields.name: default_meta_description
fields.label: Default Meta Description
fields.placeholder: Enter a default meta description for pages without one
fields.help: This will be used when pages don't have their own meta description.

fields.name: og_site_name
fields.label: Open Graph Site Name
fields.help: The name of your website as it appears on social media.

fields.name: og_image
fields.label: Default Open Graph Image URL
fields.help: Default image displayed when sharing on social media (recommended: 1200x630px).

fields.name: enable_sitemap
fields.label: Enable Sitemap Generation
fields.help: Creates a sitemap.xml file for search engines.

fields.name: robots_content
fields.label: Robots Meta Tag Content
fields.help: Controls how search engines crawl and index your site.
